name: codex-skills
description: Codex usage inspection, usage forecasting, reset-credit inspection, and goal keepalive skills.

interface.shortDescription: Usage, reset-credit, forecast, and keepalive helpers for Codex.
interface.longDescription: A small skill-only Codex plugin for checking ChatGPT-plan Codex usage, inspecting reset credits, forecasting usage exhaustion, and keeping interactive GNU Screen-backed goals resumable after usage limits clear.
defaultPrompt: Forecast when Codex usage may run out.
